introSection: Python in Bamboo Forest is a wooden roller coaster at Nanchang Sunac Land in China. It is the tallest, fastest and longest wooden roller coaster in China, as well as the tallest, fastest, and longest built by Great Coasters International.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was announced at the 2013 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA and was originally named Viper. The name was changed before opening. It opened with the park on 28 May 2016.

fullText:
Python in Bamboo Forest is a wooden roller coaster at Nanchang Sunac Land in China. It is the tallest, fastest and longest wooden roller coaster in China, as well as the tallest, fastest, and longest built by Great Coasters International.

The ride was announced at the 2013 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA and was originally named Viper. The name was changed before opening. It opened with the park on 28 May 2016.
